title: ReplicaSet — Pod Selector
text:
The
.spec.selector
field is a
label selector
. As discussed
earlier
these are the labels used to identify potential Pods to acquire. In our
frontend.yaml
example, the selector was:
matchLabels
:
tier
:
frontend
In the ReplicaSet,
.spec.template.metadata.labels
must match
spec.selector
, or it will
be rejected by the API.
